items.title: [Steam论坛] Проблемы со входом в игру
items.summary: Уже достаточно продолжительное время не могу зайти в игру со стима. Просто висит на экране с лифтом и все. Может кто может помочь?
items.author: выходное пособие

items.title: [Steam论坛] Interface is Overwhelming
items.summary:
I love Saya no Uta, so I decided to give this game a try, but let me say.

I haven't seen an interface 1/10 this convoluted and confusing in my life. Dwarf Fortress is simple and straightforward compared to this!

How many currencies does this thing have? How many sidequests (I assume that's what they are; don't really know) available from the very beginning, with no context?

I don't know what order I should play things, for a balanced and challenging experience. Should I click on the Saya thin
items.author: ScorpionWasp

items.title: [Steam论坛] Question about rolling covenants, primary stat availability
items.summary:
I am trying to get LifeDrain covenants with keyflare regen as the primary stat. I have rolled many times (from Interlude) and cannot get any parts II, III or VI with keyflare regen as the primary stat, while I have got several parts I, IV and V with that primary stat. In fact, I have observed the same for all covenants I have, not just LifeDrain.

Is it possible to get any part of a covenant with the primary stat of my choice, or are there specific limitations? For example, perhaps only parts I,
items.author: Fanta
